courses.title: 101 Monday
courses.description: Jumpstart your chatbot journey! This crash course covers essential Samy features — from building flows to AI integrations — in simple, actionable lessons. Perfect for beginners!

lessons.title: How to Use Powerful Features Inside Keywords
lessons.description: Explains how to use keywords in chatbots to trigger flows, responses, and actions — including advanced features like hot words and resuming automation.

lessons.title: Customizing Live Chat in Your Chatbot
lessons.description: How to enhance your live chat experience with customizable settings, automation, AI prompts, and agent tools for better team collaboration and customer engagement.

lessons.title: How to Manage Bot Users and Create Segments
lessons.description: Explains how to view and manage users who interacted with your chatbot — filtering, segmenting, and accessing user details within the bot's user section.

lessons.title: How to Troubleshoot your Chatbot Like a Pro
lessons.description: Explains how to debug chatbots using test users — set up test users, track their interactions through error logs, identify issues in the flow, and remove test users after debugging.

lessons.title: How to Create Dynamic WhatsApp Message Templates
lessons.description: How to set up WhatsApp template messages with dynamic variables, including headers, body content, and buttons. Step-by-step guide through creating, approving, and using templates.

lessons.description: How to build an AI agent that handles product inquiries, processes orders, and manages customer service for a Shopify store.

lessons.description: How to combine AI agents with workflow automation to create complex business processes that run entirely without human intervention.

courses.title: Web Chat Channel: Customization, Installation & Conversion Tracking
courses.description: Transform website chats into conversion engines! Master widget customization, flow triggering, user pre-filling, and GA4 tracking — all while matching your brand perfectly.

lessons.title: Where to Find the WebChat Widget
lessons.description: Introduces the webchat widget course — how to customize the widget to match your branding and install it on your website.

lessons.title: Customizing the Main Elements
lessons.description: Explains how to customize the content section of a web chat widget — chat bubbles, headers, welcome messages, out-of-office replies, and chat forms.

lessons.title: Customizing the WebChat Widget
lessons.description: Covers language settings, notification sounds, emoji/attachment uploads, chat window behaviors, mobile continuation, and domain whitelisting.

lessons.title: How to Use Pre-Chat Form
lessons.description: Covers enabling the pre-chat form, adjusting form fields (text, email, phone, date, choices), setting placeholders, hints, required fields, and layout options.

lessons.title: Customizing Your Colors
lessons.description: Tutorial on customizing the appearance of a webchat widget — themes, fonts, colors, and the start chat button including rounded corners and circle shapes.

lessons.title: How to Install the Widget
lessons.description: Demonstrates how to install webchat widgets on websites using different methods — scripts to headers or specific pages, and customizing widget styles and placement.

lessons.title: How to Start Different Flows and add Payload to your Widget
lessons.description: Explains how to trigger different chatbot flows using webchat widget URLs with custom parameters and payloads. Covers creating multiple flows and passing custom data points.

lessons.title: Different Styles of Widget
lessons.description: Demonstrates various styles of embedding web chat widgets — inline embeds, pop-up modals, full-page integrations, and floating models.

lessons.title: How to Format Text Inside WebChat Channel
lessons.description: Explains how to format text using markdown-like syntax — bold, italic, bold-italic, and strikethrough using specific symbols.

lessons.title: Embed Web Chat into any Page & Trigger Different Flow
lessons.description: Covers domain listing, installing the embed script, matching embed IDs, customizing chat appearance, and triggering different chat flows on specific pages using URL parameters.

lessons.title: Secret Trick to Open Full Page Mode
lessons.description: Explains a simple trick to open a web chat in full page mode by adding 'style=full' to the URL for a better user experience.

lessons.title: Prefill User Data For Web Chat
lessons.description: Advanced feature — passing customer information and custom parameters directly into the chat widget dynamically updating user data using scripts.

lessons.title: Set up Custom User ID
lessons.description: Explains the custom user ID feature — pass user details from an external website into the chatbot for a personalized experience for logged-in vs guest users.

lessons.title: Google Tag Manager Integration
lessons.description: Covers tracking chat engagement events, creating triggers and tags in Google Tag Manager, and sending data to Google Analytics, Facebook, and Google Ads.

lessons.title: Web Chat Conversion Tracking to GA4
lessons.description: Explains how to track web chat conversions in Google Analytics 4 — sending conversion events, attributing them to the original traffic source, using measurement protocol.

courses.indexDescription: Transform website chats into conversion engines! Master widget customization, flow triggering, user pre-filling, and GA4 tracking — all while matching your brand perfectly.
